info.title: Amido.Dax.WebApi 2.0
info.description: This is the version 2 of API for Amido DAX. This API makes it possible to handle entities such as but not limited to card owners, cards and grants. To be able to use this API a contract between partners is needed, please contact Amido for further information. All requests to version 2 must be signed.

get.summary: Gets a list of access grants at a remote system.

parameters.name: idFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of id filter. If this query parameter is present only matching ids will be returned.

parameters.name: cardOwnerFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of cardOwnerId filter. If this query parameter is present access grands of specific CardOwners will be returned.

post.summary: Grants a single access to a card owner.

patch.summary: Updates a single access grant by providing JSon patch commands.

requestBody.description: Update request entity. Null value of properties means no change.

get.summary: Gets a single access grant by provided id.

post.summary: Grants multiple access groups to a card owner.
Grants multiple card owners access to a single access group.

get.summary: Gets a list of all access groups.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 access groups in one call.

parameters.name: selectedAttributes
parameters.description: Comma separated list of keys for attribute to include in found accessgroups, if they exist.

parameters.name: folderIds
parameters.description: Comma separated list of folderids - only get accessgroups in the folders with these ids.

get.summary: Gets a specific access group by id.
Gets a list of all callbacks.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 callbacks in one call.

requestBody.description: Update request entity. Null value of properties means no change.

get.summary: Gets a specific card owner by id.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma separated list of child entities that will be included in the response. The following keywords are available: cards, postbox

parameters.name: selectedAttributes
parameters.description: Comma separated list of keys for attribute to include into the result, if they exist.

delete.summary: Deletes a card owner in Alliera by archiving it.

post.summary: Opens a door the cardowner has access to.

parameters.name: cardOwnerId
parameters.description: CardOwnerId of the user we want to list doors for.

get.summary: Gets a list of doors that are openable by a card owner.

parameters.name: cardOwnerId
parameters.description: CardOwnerId of the user we want to list doors for.

get.summary: Gets a list of card owners.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 200 card owners in one call.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma separated list of child entities that will be included in the response. The following keywords are available: cards, postbox

parameters.name: idfilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of id filter. If this query parameter is present only matching ids will be returned.

parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of name filter.

parameters.name: attributeFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated key=value pairs. If used the card owners returned need to have ALL listed attributes withthe corresponding value. If attribute filter contains keys with null-values, card owners that have these keys (no matter the value) will be returned.

parameters.name: selectedAttributes
parameters.description: Comma separated list of keys for attribute to include in the response, if they exist.

parameters.name: folderFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of folder Ids filter.

parameters.name: organisationFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of organisation Ids filter.

post.summary: Creates a new card owner. If cards are provided these will also be created.
Upload image of card owner. Card owner must be a person.

patch.summary: Updates a card. The only acceptable operations are Replace for properties and Add and Remove for collections.

requestBody.description: Update request entity. Null value of properties means no change.

get.summary: Gets a specific card by id.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 200 cards in one call.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma separated list of child entities that will be included in the response. The following keywords are available: codes

get.summary: Gets a list of all cards.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 cards in one call.

parameters.name: idFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of id filter. If this query parameter is present only matching ids will be returned.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma separated list of child entities that will be included in the response. The following keywords are available: codes

post.summary: Creates a new card connected to a card owner.

get.summary: Gets a list of all contracts where caller is either promisee or promisor.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 contracts in one call.

get.summary: Gets a list of all access groups.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 access groups in one call.

get.summary: Gets a specific access group.

post.summary: Gains access to a specified access group.

get.summary: Gets a list of all package boxes.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 boxes in one call.

get.summary: Gets information about a specific package box.

post.summary: Reserves a box within a package box system.
Gets capabilities of delivery methods to recipient identified by email and/or mobile phone.

get.summary: Gets a specific Folder by id.

parameters.name: includeChildFolders
parameters.description: If this query parameter is true get all child folders and the parent folder.

requestBody.description: Update request entity. Null value of properties means no change.

get.summary: Gets a list of all Folders.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 Folders in one call.

parameters.name: idFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of id filter. If this query parameter is present only matching ids will be returned.

get.summary: Gets a list of log entries from remote partner and instance.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 organizations in one call.

requestBody.description: Update request entity. Null value of properties means no change.

get.summary: Gets a list of all organizations.
get.description: With pagination you can fetch up to 50 organizations in one call.

parameters.name: idFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of id filter. If this query parameter is present only matching ids will be returned.

parameters.name: folderIdFilter
parameters.description: Comma separated list of folderIds - only get organizations in the folders with these ids.

get.summary: Gets a specific organization by id.
Gets a list of recipients by system ids.

message.description:
This message is moved to the message property of DaxApiResponse when sent to client and will not
be a part of the response object.

familyName.description: Last or surname of card owner.

specificName.description: First or specific name of card owner.

cardOwnerType.description: What type of card owner, either Person or Apartment.

cards.description: List of cards to add to the card owner.

folderId.description: Id of folder where the card owner should be created.

attributes.description: Key-value pair of attributes associated with this card owner.

organizationId.description: Organization id this card owner will be connected to.

comment.example: This is a card owner comment.

startTime.description:
Start time of this card owner. Use null to indicate open start time (i.e. from right now). Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.

stopTime.description:
Stop time for card owner. Use null to indicate open ended never expiring. Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.

disabled.description: Should this card owner start out as disabled or not.

cardOwnerId.description: Id of card owner. If not specified, an id will be generated.

message.description:
This message is moved to the message property of DaxApiResponse when sent to client and will not
be a part of the response object.

This message is moved to the message property of DaxApiResponse when sent to client and will not
be a part of the response object.

This message is moved to the message property of DaxApiResponse when sent to client and will not
be a part of the response object.

classification.description:
Card classification, either regular or restricted. Should almost always be "regular".
<example>regular</example>

pinCode.description:
Pin code associated with card. If not provided the card owner's pin code will be used (this is the default and preferred).
<example>9999</example>

startTime.description:
Time timestamp from which the card will be valid or null if not set. Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.

stopTime.description:
Time timestamp from when the card will stop working or null if open ended. Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.

disabled.description: Should this card start out as disabled or not.

accessControlInstanceId.description: Access control instance id or instance id for short.

lastActiveUtc.description: Timestamp when instance was last active

clientVersion.description: DAX Client Library version for this instance.

remoteAccessGroupId.description: Id of access group at remote system.

remoteName.description: Name of access group at remote system.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of access group, if set.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of access group, if set.

tags.description: Collection of tags associated with this access group.

name.description: Name of access group at remote system.

folderId.description: The Organizer folder that contains the access group.

attributes.description: Dynamic attributes for the AccessGroup in key value pairs.

eventType.description: Type of event to register callback for.

bearerToken.description: Bearer token header for this callback.

headers.description: Additional headers to be set to outgoing requests.

eventType.description: Type of event to register callback for.

bearerToken.description: Bearer token header for this callback.

headers.description: Additional headers to be set to outgoing requests.

disabled.description: Disabled status of card - true if disabled.

startTime.description: Start time of card validity, null if not set.

stopTime.description: Stop time of card validity, null if open ended.

state.description: Current state of card, either Active or Archived.

archivedAt.description: If archived timestamp of when archived.

cardOwnerType.description: Type of card owner, i.e. person or apartment.

familyName.description: Last or surname of card owner.

specificName.description: First or specific name of card owner.

folderId.description: Card owner's folder Id or null if it's not present.

disabled.description: Indicates if card owner is disabled.

startTime.description: Card owner's start time or null if not set.

stopTime.description: Card owner's stop time or null if open ended.

state.description: State of card owner i.e. active or archived.

archivedAt.description: If archived, the card owner was archived at this time.

postBoxNames.description: Postbox names for cardowner including name priority.

tags.description: Collection of tags associated with this contract.

height.description: Height of box in millimeters, if applicable.

width.description: Width of box in millimeters, if applicable.

depth.description: Depth of box in millimeters, if applicable.

maximumLoad.description: Maximum load in grams, if applicable.

Amido.Dax.Contracts.Dto.Deliveries.BoxIt.description: Box information within a package box system.

placement.description: Where is the box placed, inside or outside.

country.description: Country of package box in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 notation.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of package box in WGS84 decimal degrees.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of package box in WGS84 decimal degrees.

numberOfBoxes.description: Number of boxes in the package box.

boxSizes.description: What box sizes are available in this package box.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of door, if available. In decimal WGS84 format. Currently unused.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of door, if available. In decimal WGS84 format. Currently unused.

cardOwnerId.description: Cardowner this accessgrant was granted to.

cardId.description: Card id of card if access grant was granted to a specific card.

revoked.description: Revocation status - if revoked this is true.

revokeTime.description: If revoked, time stamp of revocation.

accessGroupId.description: Id of access group for this grant.

disabled.description: Disabled state - if disabled this is true.

startTime.description: Start time for this access grant - null if not set.

stopTime.description: Stop time for this access grant - null if open ended.

priority.description: Priority for post box text - lower number is higher priority.

cardOwnerId.description: Card owner's id for whom the grant will be used.

cardId.description: If grant is issued to single card card id goes here. Normally a grant is issued to the card owner and not to the card.

cardClassification.description:
If grant is being targeted at all cards of a certain card classification the classification goes here. Normally this is left empty and grant
is only issued to specific cardowner/card.

accessGroupId.description: Access group that card owner/card will gain access to.

startTime.description:
Start time of the access grant. Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.

stopTime.description:
Stop time of the access grant. Note that the
timestamp is in the remote partner's local time.
